headline: 3 Reasons We Love Moody's (MCO)
summary: Over the last six months, Moody’s shares have sunk to $455, producing a disappointing 10.7% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 9% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Moody’s Corporation (MCO): One of the Best Financial Stocks According to Warren Buffett
summary: We just covered the 10 Best Financial Stocks to Buy According to Warren Buffett and Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) ranks 4th on this list. Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) is one of the most prominent long-term bets of Berkshire Hathaway. The stock has consistently featured in the 13F portfolio of the hedge fund since the fourth quarter of […]
